# Icosapent Ethyl 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Icosapent Ethyl 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Icosapent Ethyl</strong> 目前有 <strong>5 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Icosapent Ethyl 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Indicated to reduce cardiovascular risk as an adjunct to statin therapy.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>hemoglobinopathy（99.1%）</li>
<li>partial deletion of the short arm of chromosome 16（98.7%）</li>
<li>beta-thalassemia with other manifestations（98.7%）</li>
<li>myocardial infarction（98.6%）</li>
<li>hemolytic anemia due to glucophosphate isomerase deficiency（98.5%）</li>
<li>pyruvate kinase deficiency of red cells（98.4%）</li>
<li>pyropoikilocytosis, hereditary（98.4%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid arthritis（98.1%）</li>
<li>posterolateral myocardial infarction（98.1%）</li>
<li>posteroinferior myocardial infarction（98.1%）</li>
<li>septal myocardial infarction（98.0%）</li>
<li class="indication-matched">heart disease（98.0%）<span class="indication-tag">📰 cardiopatía</span></li>
<li>Jeune syndrome situs inversus（97.9%）</li>
<li>Pierre Robin syndrome associated with a chromosomal anomaly（97.9%）</li>
<li>pulmonary valve disease（97.8%）</li>
<li>interventricular septum aneurysm（97.8%）</li>
<li>orofacial clefting syndrome（97.8%）</li>
<li>partial deletion of the long arm of chromosome 22（97.8%）</li>
<li>partial deletion of the long arm of chromosome 7（97.8%）</li>
<li>disorder of fucoglycosan synthesis（97.8%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/icosapent-ethyl/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
